_comment: Canonical fast-moving facts the rust-ops skill encodes. scripts/check-rust-facts.py asserts SKILL.md + references name these consistently (--offline) and probes crates.io for major-version drift (--live). Edit deliberately: a change here is a skill-content decision, not housekeeping.

packages.name: tokio
packages.where: SKILL.md (#[tokio::main], tokio::join!/select!, mpsc/oneshot/broadcast/watch channels); references/async-tokio.md. The #[tokio::main]/#[tokio::test] + tokio::join! surface is the Tokio 1.x API.

packages.name: axum
packages.where: SKILL.md (async decision tree: 'axum (tower-based)'); references/ecosystem.md (axum::Router, axum::serve, extractors). Axum has shipped as 0.x throughout.

packages.name: serde
packages.where: SKILL.md (#[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)], serde_json::to_string); references/ecosystem.md. The derive + serde_json surface is the Serde 1.x API.
